query:
SELECT c.id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, c.phone, c.source, c.account_id, a.name as account_name, c.created_at
FROM contacts c
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = c.account_id
WHERE c.email = 'testpremier@example.com'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
